title: Salad Bowl Large Glass Serving Bowl Bella Perle Beaded Edge Salad Snack Fruit Dessert Trifle Glass Bowl 2L Multi Purpose Dining Table Kitchen Serving Dish (N319)
seller_info_text: Dibor - French Style Accessories for the Home
features: Extra large multi-purpose Bella Perle serving dish bowl made from high quality glass with a beaded edge finish - Please note due to the production process, finish may vary from piece to piece
As used by celebrity chef's Nigella Lawson and Mary Berry, this large glass bowl is a stylish and practical addition to the kitchen as both a mixing bowl and serving solution
Large bowl measures H11 x D20cm and has an approximate capacity of 2L - Hand wash only recommended to protect the finish of the item, not dishwasher or microwave safe
Suitable for a wide array of uses and serving solutions, this big bowl is perfect for everything from alfresco dining with salads during the summer months and winter desserts
These serving dishes are the perfect way to prepare and serve everything from crisp salads and hearty roasted vegetables to indulgent desserts like trifle, tiramisu and Eton mess
description: Product Description Large Bella Perle Bowl Made from heavy duty toughened glass with our signature beaded edge finish design, this beautifully designed and versatile bowl is perfect for a wide array of serving and food preparation uses. Versatile Use Holding approximately 2L, our large Bella Perle bowls are suitable for a wide array of uses whether serving a freshly prepared salad, an indulgent dessert or preparing the ingredients for your signature cake recipe. Glass Bead Details Beautifully decorated with a beaded edge finish design, our Bella Perle range boasts elegance and luxury that will look at home in both a vintage style or modern contemporary kitchen. Hand Finished Hand finished, each bowl is carefully made to ensure quality and toughness allowing it to be used for many years to come. As Seen On TV Loved by the likes of Nigella Lawson, Mary Berry and This Morning, our Bella Perle glassware range has become a firm favourite of TV chefs for preparing and serving a wide array of dishes. About us... Proud to be family run and a local business from our roots in the historic town of Harrogate, our close-knit team work together to create beautiful products and provide a positive buying experience from start to finish. Finishing touches... Kitchen & Table Linen All made from 100% machine washable cotton, our range of kitchen and table linen has a wide array of products and designs to suit every occasion and style. Embossed Glassware Made from dishwasher safe embossed glass, our luxury glassware collection is ideal for enjoying a wide array of drinks at home with friends and family. Tablescapes Add the finishing touches to the table with our specially designed tablescapes with everything from garlands and wreaths to table scatters to make your dining space that little bit more special. Candle Holders Illuminate the dining room or kitchen with our range of candle holders and lanterns suitable for everything from tea lights and votives to taper and pillar candles with designs and colour schemes to suit every style.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Food safe, Microwave Safe, Rippled finish design, Dishwasher safe
